hero.headline: Digital systems that grow your business
hero.subheadline: We design and implement tailored solutions that eliminate friction and accelerate results.

pain1.title: Manual processes stealing your time
pain1.body: Your team spends hours on repetitive tasks: copying data between spreadsheets, sending follow-up emails, building reports by hand. Time that could go to work that actually matters.

pain2.title: Decisions without real-time data
pain2.body: Your information is scattered across different tools and you have to wait until month-end to know how the business is doing. Late decisions cost money.

pain3.title: Technology that doesn't adapt to your business
pain3.body: You use generic tools that force you to adapt your processes to them, instead of the other way around. Every workaround is debt that accumulates.

step1.title: Diagnose
step1.description: We start by understanding your business: current processes, real pain points, growth objectives. No assumptions — only listening and analysis.

step2.title: Build
step2.description: We develop the solution in short iterations with real deliverables. You see progress from the first week, not at the end of the project.

step3.title: Grow
step3.description: We measure results, adjust, and scale. The system evolves with your business so growth doesn't find you without the infrastructure to support it.

retainer.heading: Ongoing support
retainer.body: The launch is just the beginning. Businesses that grow need technology that evolves with them: new features, optimizations, fast response to issues.
retainer.body2: We work with select clients on a monthly retainer model, as an extended technical team that already knows your system and can act without friction.

founder1.name: Founder 1
founder1.bio: Software architect with over 10 years building systems for growing businesses. Specialist in scalable system design and product teams.
founder1.imageAlt: Photo of Founder 1, co-founder and CTO of nexdevp

founder2.name: Founder 2
founder2.bio: Business strategist focused on digital transformation. Has guided more than 30 companies in implementing technology that generates measurable results.
founder2.imageAlt: Photo of Founder 2, co-founder and CEO of nexdevp

leadCapture.heading: Ready to grow your business?
leadCapture.subheading: A 30-minute call is enough to understand if we can help you. No commitment, no pressure.

meta.siteDescription: We design and implement digital systems that grow your business. Consulting, development and automation.

booking.dialogDescription: Choose the time that works best for you for a free diagnostic call.
